## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] **Bug fix** - Non-breaking change that fixes an issue
- [ ] **New feature** - Non-breaking change that adds functionality
- [ ] **Breaking change** - Fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change
- [ ] **Documentation** - Updates to docs, README, or comments only
- [ ] **Refactoring** - Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature
- [ ] **Performance** - Changes that improve performance
- [ ] **Tests** - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] **Chore** - Maintenance tasks, dependency updates, etc.

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style
- [ ] I have used proper Markdown formatting
- [ ] ASCII art alignment is preserved
- [ ] Template variables use correct syntax

### Testing

- [ ] I have tested with at least 2 different project types
- [ ] I have verified no zone conflicts exist
- [ ] I have confirmed worker spawning works correctly
- [ ] The splash screen displays correctly

### Documentation

- [ ] I have added/updated relevant documentation
- [ ] My commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] I have added a CHANGELOG entry

### Final Checks

- [ ] There are no merge conflicts
